experiment: B18: B2 architecture + EMA weight averaging
note: B18 keeps the exact B2 ResNet34-U-Net + BRR/RBSG architecture and changes only the training protocol. Multiple previous B2 extensions improved one axis but failed to beat B2 on test Dice, suggesting that generalization stability may be more valuable than another module.

design_references.title: Mean teachers are better role models
design_references.adopted_idea: EMA of weights provides smoother, more stable evaluation targets without changing the architecture

design_references.title: nnU-Net Revisited
design_references.adopted_idea: strong CNN/U-Net baselines should be improved with rigorous, minimal, well-controlled changes

design_references.title: When CNNs Outperform Transformers and Mambas
design_references.adopted_idea: dental caries segmentation benefits from task-aligned CNN inductive bias under limited data

failure_reflection.b10_dmsk: test Dice and Recall dropped, suggesting dynamic skip selection overfit or became conservative
failure_reflection.b12_tdr: higher Precision but lower Recall, not enough Dice gain
failure_reflection.b17_wavelet: best validation Dice but lower test Dice, suggesting validation/checkpoint instability
failure_reflection.b18_hypothesis: EMA may reduce checkpoint variance without changing B2's precision/recall balance
